mapper.select: select wr.id, wr.withdrawal_code, m.nickname as artist_name, m.email as artist_email, m.id as artist_id, m.status as member_status, coalesce(( select sum(o.total_price) from tbl_order o where o.seller_id = m.id and o.status = 'COMPLETED' ), 0) as total_sales_amount, ( select count(*) from tbl_withdrawal_request wr2 where wr2.member_id = m.id ) as withdrawal_history_count, coalesce(( select sum(wr3.net_amount) from tbl_withdrawal_request wr3 where wr3.member_id = m.id and wr3.status in ('APPROVED', 'PAID') ), 0) as withdrawal_history_total, wr.bank_name, wr.account_number, wr.account_holder, wr.requested_amount, wr.fee, wr.net_amount, coalesce(( select sum(s.net_amount) from tbl_settlement s where s.member_id = m.id and s.status = 'PAID' ), 0) - coalesce(( select sum(wr4.net_amount) from tbl_withdrawal_request wr4 where wr4.member_id = m.id and wr4.status in ('APPROVED', 'PAID') ), 0) as current_balance, coalesce(( select sum(s2.net_amount) from tbl_settlement s2 where s2.member_id = m.id and s2.status = 'PAID' ), 0) - coalesce(( select sum(wr5.net_amount) from tbl_withdrawal_request wr5 where wr5.member_id = m.id and wr5.status in ('APPROVED', 'PAID') ), 0) - wr.net_amount as after_balance, to_char(wr.requested_at, 'YY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as requested_at, am.nickname as approver_name, to_char(wr.approved_at, 'YY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as approved_at, wr.rejected_reason, wr.status from tbl_withdrawal_request wr join tbl_member m on wr.member_id = m.id left join tbl_member am on wr.admin_id = am.id where wr.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_withdrawal_request set status = 'APPROVED', approved_at = now(), admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING'
update tbl_withdrawal_request set status = 'REJECTED', rejected_reason = #{reason}, admin_id = #{adminId}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'PENDING'
